productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Elastic Strap Beige Heels
description: Beige heels from catwalk created for the understated fashionista. Pair these shoes with a bright coloured outfit. Upper Synthetic leather strap for the forefoot Synthetic leather footbed and heel cup Elasticated loop from the heel cup to the midfoot for a snug Fit Cushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added style Outsole TPU outsole with heel Textured design on forefoot and heel for added comfort shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
